briefdescription.para: delegate for handling lobby connection disconnected.

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelByteMessagingSystem &InMessagingSystemRef, FAccelByteNetworkConditioner &InNetworkConditionerRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr, float InPingDelay=30.f, float InInitialBackoffDelay=1.f, float InMaxBackoffDelay=30.f, float InTotalTimeout=60.f)
memberdef.name: Lobby

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelByteMessagingSystem &InMessagingSystemRef, FAccelByteNetworkConditioner &InNetworkConditionerRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform, float InPingDelay=30.f, float InInitialBackoffDelay=1.f, float InMaxBackoffDelay=30.f, float InTotalTimeout=60.f)
memberdef.name: Lobby

briefdescription.para: delegate for handling info party response.
delegate for handling info party response.
delegate for handling create party response.
delegate for handling leave party response.
delegate for handling leave party notification. This delegate is DEPRECATED
delegate for handling leave party notification.
delegate for handling invite party response.
delegate for handling party invitation notification
delegate for handling get party invitation notification
delegate for handling join party response
delegate for handling join party notification
delegate for handling reject party response
delegate for handling reject party notification
delegate for handling member kicked from party event
delegate for handling member kicked from party event notification
delegate for handling update data notification
delegate for handling party connect notification
delegate for handling party disconnect notification
delegate for handling generate party code event
delegate for handling get party code event
delegate for handling delete party code event
delegate for handling join party via party code event
delegate for handling promote party leader response
delegate for handling sending a notification to a party member
delegate for handling notification from a party member
delegate for handling private message response
delegate for handling private message event notification
delegate for handling party message event response
delegate for handling party message event notification
delegate for handling join default channel message event response
delegate for handling channel message event response
delegate for handling channel message event notification
delegate for handling user change presence status
delegate for handling other user change their presence status event
delegate for handling get all user presence
delegate for handling incoming notification
delegate for handling ban notification
delegate for handling unban notification
delegate for handling request friend response
delegate for handling unfriend response
delegate for handling list outgoing friends response
delegate for handling list outgoing friends response with added requiredAt timestamp
delegate for handling cancel friend response
delegate for handling list incoming friends response
delegate for handling list incoming friends response with added requiredAt timestamp
delegate for handling accept friend response
delegate for handling reject friend response
delegate for handling load friend list response
delegate for handling get friendship status response
delegate for handling notification when your request friend is accepted
delegate for handling notification when you receive a request friend
delegate for handling unfriend notification
delegate for handling cancel friend notification
delegate for handling reject friend notification
delegate for handling block player response
delegate for handling unblock player response
delegate for handling list blocked user response
delegate for handling list blocker response
delegate for handling notification when you block a player
delegate for handling notification when you unblock a player
delegate for handling signaling P2P message
delegate for handling signaling P2P message
delegate for handling response when setting session attribute
delegate for handling response when setting session attribute
delegate for handling response when setting session attribute
delegate for handling response when refreshing lobby token.
delegate for handling successfully connecting to lobby.
Delegate for party members changed event.
Delegate for user invited to party event.
Delegate for user party invitation timed out event. Notification when a party invitation has been timeout.
Delegate for user rejected invitation event.
Delegate for user joined party event.
Delegate for user kicked from party event.
Delegate for party invite canceled event. Will be triggered when any outgoing invitation canceled. Inviter and Invitee will receive it.
Delegate for user invited to game session event.
Delegate for user game session invitation timed out event. Notification when a game session invitation has been timeout.
Delegate for user joined game session event.
Delegate for game session members changed event.
Delegate for game session updated event.
Delegate for game session updated event.
Delegate for game session invite rejected event.
Delegate for game session ended event. Will be triggered when DS unregistered.
Delegate for game session invite canceled event. Will be triggered when any outgoing invitation canceled. Inviter and Invitee will receive it.
Delegate for session storage changed event.
Delegate for session joined secret event.
Delegate for game session when DS status is changed.
Delegate for notif when match is found.
Delegate for notification when party leader started matchmaking.
Delegate for notification when matchmaking ticket expired.
Delegate for notification when party leader canceled matchmaking.
delegate for handling set user region response
Delegate for a native session sync event from session service.
Delegate for notification when entitlements are updated.
Delegate for notification when wallet balance are changed.
Delegate for notification when wallet status are changed.
Connect to the Lobby server via websocket. You must connect to the server before you can start sending/receiving. Also make sure you have logged in first as this operation requires access token.
Disconnect from server if and only if the you have connected to server. If not currently connected, then this does nothing.
Check whether the websocket is currently connected to the Lobby server.

simplesect.para: true if it's connected, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check whether the websocket is currently trying to reconnect to the Lobby server.

simplesect.para: true if it's connected, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Send ping.
Send a private message to another user.

parameterdescription.para: The recipient's user ID.
Message to be sent.

briefdescription.para: Send a message to other party members.

parameterdescription.para: Message to be sent.

briefdescription.para: Request to join the default channel chat.
Send a message to joined channel chat.
Get information about current party.
Create a party.
Leave current party.
Invite a user to party.

parameterdescription.para: The target user ID to be invited.

briefdescription.para: Accept a party invitation.

parameterdescription.para: Party ID from the invitation notice.
Random string from the invitation notice.

briefdescription.para: Reject a party invitation.

parameterdescription.para: Party ID from the invitation notice.
Random string from the invitation notice.

briefdescription.para: Kick a party member.

parameterdescription.para: The target user ID to be kicked.

briefdescription.para: Generate Party code.
Get Party code.
Remove Party invite code.
Join Party via party code.

parameterdescription.para: The target party Code to be joined.

briefdescription.para: Promote party member to party leader.

parameterdescription.para: The target user ID to be promoted.

briefdescription.para: Send notification to party member.

parameterdescription.para: The topic of the request. Can use this as ID to know how to marshal the payload
The Payload of the request. Can be JSON string

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PartyId, int32 Limit, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SetPartySizeLimit

briefdescription.para: Set the party's member limit.

parameterdescription.para: The party id to be set.
The party member limit, should be above 0 and below the configured limit in admin portal.
The callback triggered when operation is successful
the callback triggered when operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Get all pending notification(s) that is sent to user when user is not connected to lobby. Please call this function after user connected to lobby.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsQueryFriendListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: QueryFriendList

briefdescription.para: Query the friend list of current user. The result is friend ids in pagination format.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsIncomingFriendRequests > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: QueryIncomingFriendRequest

briefdescription.para: Query the incoming friend requests for current user. The result is friend requests with requested time info in pagination format.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsOutgoingFriendRequests > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: QueryOutgoingFriendRequest

briefdescription.para: Query the outgoing friend requests for current user. The result is friend requests with requested time info in pagination format.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Send friend request to other user by user id.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Send friend request to other user by public id.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted public ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Cancel outgoing friend request.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Accept friend request from other user.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Reject friend request from other user.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsFriendshipStatusResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetFriendshipStatus

briefdescription.para: Get friendship status of current user with other user.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Unfriend a user from friend list.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Block specified player from being able to do certain action against current user the specified player will be removed from friend list.

detaileddescription.para: Action that blocked player can't do : -Add Friend -Direct Chat -Invite to Party -Invite to Group -Matchmaking as one alliance
Additional Limitation : Blocked Player can't access blocker/current user's user ID

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Unblock specified player enabling them to do certain action against current user.

detaileddescription.para: Action that unblocked player can do : -Add Friend -Direct Chat -Invite to Party -Invite to Group -Matchmaking as one alliance
Additional Limitation : Unblocked Player can now access blocker/current user's user ID

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Send request friend request.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.

briefdescription.para: Send friend request by public ID.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user's PublicId.

briefdescription.para: Send unfriend request.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.

briefdescription.para: Send list of outgoing friends request.
Send list of outgoing friends request with requestedAt timestamp.
Send cancel friend request.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.

briefdescription.para: Send list of incoming friends request.
Send list of incoming friends request with requestedAt timestamp.
Send accept friend request.
Send reject friend request.
Send load friends list request.
Send get friendship status request.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted user ID.

briefdescription.para: Block specified player from being able to do certain action against current user the specified player will be removed from friend list.

detaileddescription.para: Action that blocked player can't do : -Add Friend -Direct Chat -Invite to Party -Invite to Group -Matchmaking as one alliance
Additional Limitation : Blocked Player can't access blocker/current user's user ID

parameterdescription.para: the specified player's user ID. (Target to block)

briefdescription.para: Unblock specified player enabling them to do certain action against current user.

detaileddescription.para: Action that unblocked player can do : -Add Friend -Direct Chat -Invite to Party -Invite to Group -Matchmaking as one alliance
Additional Limitation : Unblocked Player can now access blocker/current user's user ID

parameterdescription.para: the specified player's user ID. (Target to block)

briefdescription.para: Send a signaling message to another user.

parameterdescription.para: The recipient's user ID.
Signaling message to be sent.

briefdescription.para: Set user attribute to lobby session.

parameterdescription.para: the attribute's key.
the attribute's value.

briefdescription.para: Get user attribute from lobby session.

parameterdescription.para: the attribute's key.

briefdescription.para: Get all user attribute from lobby session.
Refresh access token used in lobby.

parameterdescription.para: New access token to use.

briefdescription.para: Unbind all delegates set previously.
Unbind all party notif delegates set previously.
Unbind all party response delegates set previously.
Unbind all friend notif delegates set previously.
Unbind all friend response delegates set previously.
Unbind all chat notif delegates set previously.
Unbind all chat response delegates set previously.
Unbind all Block notif delegates set previously.
Unbind all Block response delegates set previously.
Unbind all session attribute response delegates set previously.
Unbind all V2 party delegates set previously.
Unbind all V2 party delegates set previously.
Unbind all shared notif for session and v2 party set previously.
Unbind all V2 matchmaking delegates set previously.
Unbind all message notification delegates set previously.
Set a trigger function when successfully connect to lobby.
Set a trigger function when connection to lobby failed.
Set a trigger function when connection to lobby is disconnected.
Set a trigger function when connection is closed.
Set a trigger function when connection is closed and reconnecting.
Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when an attempt to reconnect websocket has been done.
Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when connection is down & can't be reestablished. Longer than usual.
Set a trigger function when a party member leave from the party. This function is DEPRECATED.

parameterdescription.para: delegate parameter with returned model called FAccelByteModelsLeavePartyNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a party member leave from the party.

parameterdescription.para: delegate parameter with returned model called FAccelByteModelsLeavePartyNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a party member reconnecting to the lobby.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyMemberConnectionNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a party member disconnect from lobby.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyMemberConnectionNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when other user is invited to party.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsInvitationNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when receiving a party invite.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyGetInvitedNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a new member joins the party.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyJoinNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a party invitation is rejected.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyRejectNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when kicked from party.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsGotKickedFromPartyNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when party data is updated.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when party data is updated.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when received a party chat (v1).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsPartyMessageNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when friends presence is updated.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsUsersPresenceNotice

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when receiving a notification message.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsNotificationMessage

briefdescription.para: Add a delegate when receiving a notification message.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsNotificationMessage

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when receiving a notification message.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsNotificationMessage

briefdescription.para: Remove a trigger function when receiving a notification message.

parameterdescription.para: Delegate handle to be removed

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when receiving invite to a party (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartyInvitedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when an party (v2) invitation is already timeout.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FV2PartyInviteTimeoutNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when party members changed (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartyMembersChangedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a new member joined current party (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartyUserJoinedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a party invitation is rejected (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartyUserRejectedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when getting kicked from a party (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartyUserKickedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when receiving invite to a game session (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSessionUserInvitedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when an game session (v2) invitation is already timeout.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FV2GameSessionInviteTimeoutNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a new member joined the game session (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSessionUserJoinedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a game session member changes (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSessionMembersChangedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a game session data changes (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSession

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when kicked from a game session (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSessionUserKickedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when an invitation is rejected (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSessionUserRejectedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when game session ended by the DS (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2GameSessionEndedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when session storage content changes (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2SessionStorageChangedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when party storage content changes (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartyStorageChangedEvent

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when session (with secret server enabled) joined (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2SessionJoinedSecret

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a DS status changes (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2DSStatusChangedNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a party data is updated (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2PartySession

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when matchmaking ticket is successfully matched (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2MatchFoundNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when leader created a matchmaking ticket (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2StartMatchmakingNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when matchmaking ticket is expired and matchmaking stopped (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2MatchmakingExpiredNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when leader cancelled matchmaking (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2MatchmakingCanceledNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when leader cancelled matchmaking (v2).

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsV2MatchmakingCanceledNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when user is banned.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsUserBannedNotification

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when user is unbanned.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsUserBannedNotification

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a friend request is accepted.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsAcceptFriendsNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when a friend request is received.

parameterdescription.para: return models called FAccelByteModelsRequestFriendsNotif

briefdescription.para: Set a trigger function when friend request is rejected.

briefdescription.para: Bulk add friend(s), don't need any confirmation from the player.

parameterdescription.para: the list of UserId you want to make friend with.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsSyncThirdPartyFriendsRequest const &Request, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsSyncThirdPartyFriendsResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SyncThirdPartyFriends

briefdescription.para: Sync platform specific friend list to AccelByte friend list. This will automatically add platform specific friend list to AccelByte friend list if the friends already linked their account to AccelByte service.

parameterdescription.para: the request of S2S friend sync.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsSyncThirdPartyBlockListRequest const &Request, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsSyncThirdPartyBlockListResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SyncThirdPartyBlockList

briefdescription.para: Sync third party platform block list to the AccelByte block list. Automatically will add players from the platform block list to the AccelByte block list, if the blocked player has linked their account with an AccelByte account.

parameterdescription.para: Request model used to configure the block list sync API call
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PartyId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPartyData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPartyData

briefdescription.para: Get party data by party ID.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted party Id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsPartyData model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatusNotif > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool CountOnly=false)
memberdef.name: BulkGetUserPresence

briefdescription.para: Bulk Get User(s) Presence, can get specific user's presence status not limited to friend.

parameterdescription.para: the list of UserId you want to request.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatusNotif.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Will only return the status count, without the user's data when set to true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatusNotif > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool CountOnly=false)
memberdef.name: BulkGetUserPresenceV2

briefdescription.para: Bulk Get User(s) Presence, can get specific user's presence status not limited to friend.

parameterdescription.para: the list of UserId you want to request.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is a FAccelByteModelsBulkUserStatusNotif.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Will only return the status count, without the user's data when set to true.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PartyId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPartyDataNotif > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPartyStorage

briefdescription.para: Get party storage (attributes) by party ID.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted party Id.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsPartyDataNotif model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GetListOfBlockedUsers

briefdescription.para: List Blocked User's Id.

parameterdescription.para: User Id of the Player.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsListBlockedUserResponse model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: List Blocked User's Id, override of GetListOfBlockedUser, will get current user's List of Blocked User's Id.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsListBlockedUserResponse model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsListBlockerResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetListOfBlockers

briefdescription.para: List Id of Player that blocks an User.

parameterdescription.para: User Id of the Player.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsListBlockerResponse model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: List Blockers User's Id, override of GetListOfBlocker, will get current user's List of Blocker User's Id.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsListBlockerResponse model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SendToUserId, FAccelByteModelsFreeFormNotificationRequest const &Message, bool bAsync, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendNotificationToUser

briefdescription.para: (DEPRECATED) Send a freeform notification message to a user

parameterdescription.para: user id to send this notification message
notification message
shou;d the message be sent even if the receiving user is offline?
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsListBlockerResponse model.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &PartyId, TFunction< FJsonObjectWrapper(FJsonObjectWrapper)> const &PayloadModifier, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPartyDataNotif > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint32 RetryAttempt=1)
memberdef.name: WritePartyStorage

briefdescription.para: Write party storage (attributes) data to the targeted party ID. Beware: Object will not be write immediately, please take care of the original object until it written.

parameterdescription.para: Targeted party Id.
Function to modify the latest party data with your customized modifier.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsPartyDataNotif model.
This will be called when the operation failed.
the number of retry to do when there is an error in writing to party storage (likely due to write conflicts).

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Set token generator to be used when trying to connect to lobby using ownership token.

parameterdescription.para: The token generator.

briefdescription.para: Change current user region for metric.

parameterdescription.para: The region of current user based on lowest ping to QOS servers.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetUserNotificationsResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FDateTime const &StartTime=FDateTime{0}, FDateTime const &EndTime=FDateTime{0}, int32 Offset=0, int32 Limit=25)
memberdef.name: GetNotifications

briefdescription.para: Get list of notifications from current user from specified time.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. Will return FAccelByteModelsGetUserNotificationsResponse model.
This will be called when the operation failed.
[Optional] The beginning sequenceID to query.
[Optional] The end sequenceID to query.
[Optional] The offset of the result. Default value is 0.
[Optional] The limit of the result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Lock notifications that has SequenceID. Next notification received won't be broadcasted until key is destroyed.

simplesect.para: Key of the lock, while key exist next notifications won't be broadcasted.

briefdescription.para: Startup module.
Checks whether any future unban notifications are scheduled.
delegate for handling matchmaking response
delegate for handling ready consent response
delegate for handling reject consent response
delegate for handling matchmaking notification
delegate for handling reject consent notification
delegate for handling rematchmaking notification
delegate for handling DS notification

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameMode, FString const &ServerName, FString const &ClientVersion=TEXT(""), TArray< TPair< FString, float > > const &Latencies={}, TMap< FString, FString > const &PartyAttributes={}, TArray< FString > const &TempPartyUserIds={}, TArray< FString > const &ExtraAttributes={})
memberdef.name: SendStartMatchmaking

briefdescription.para: start the matchmaking

parameterdescription.para: The mode that party member want to play.
The Local DS name, fill it blank if you don't use Local DS.
The version of DS, fill it blank to choose the default version.
list of servers and their latencies to client, DSM will created the server on one of this list. Fill it blank if you use Local DS.
String map custom attributes to be added on matchmaking and also will be passed to ds too. Example: {"Map":"Dungeon1", "Rank":"B", "Stage":"04"}
UserIDs to form a temporary party with (include user who started the matchmaking). Temporary party will disband when matchmaking finishes.
custom attributes defined in game mode's matching/flexing rule.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameMode, TArray< FString > const &TempPartyUserIds, FString const &ServerName=TEXT(""), FString const &ClientVersion=TEXT(""), TArray< TPair< FString, float > > const &Latencies={}, TMap< FString, FString > const &PartyAttributes={}, TArray< FString > const &ExtraAttributes={})
memberdef.name: SendStartMatchmaking

briefdescription.para: start the matchmaking

parameterdescription.para: The mode that party member want to play.
UserIDs to form a temporary party with (include user who started the matchmaking). Temporary party will disband when matchmaking finishes.
The Local DS name, fill it blank if you don't use Local DS.
The version of DS, fill it blank to choose the default version.
list of servers and their latencies to client, DSM will created the server on one of this list. Fill it blank if you use Local DS.
String map custom attributes to be added on matchmaking and also will be passed to ds too. Example: {"Map":"Dungeon1", "Rank":"B", "Stage":"04"}
custom attributes defined in game mode's matching/flexing rule.

memberdef.name: SendStartMatchmaking

briefdescription.para: start the matchmaking

parameterdescription.para: The mode that party member want to play.
String map custom attributes to be added on matchmaking and also will be passed to ds too. Example: {"Map":"Dungeon1", "Rank":"B", "Stage":"04"}
The Local DS name, fill it blank if you don't use Local DS.
The version of DS, fill it blank to choose the default version.
list of servers and their latencies to client, DSM will created the server on one of this list. Fill it blank if you use Local DS.
UserIDs to form a temporary party with (include user who started the matchmaking). Temporary party will disband when matchmaking finishes.
custom attributes defined in game mode's matching/flexing rule.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameMode, TMap< FString, FString > const &PartyAttributes, TArray< FString > const &TempPartyUserIds, FString const &ServerName=TEXT(""), FString const &ClientVersion=TEXT(""), TArray< TPair< FString, float > > const &Latencies={}, TArray< FString > const &ExtraAttributes={})
memberdef.name: SendStartMatchmaking

briefdescription.para: start the matchmaking

parameterdescription.para: The mode that party member want to play.
String map custom attributes to be added on matchmaking and also will be passed to ds too. Example: {"Map":"Dungeon1", "Rank":"B", "Stage":"04"}
UserIDs to form a temporary party with (include user who started the matchmaking). Temporary party will disband when matchmaking finishes.
The Local DS name, fill it blank if you don't use Local DS.
The version of DS, fill it blank to choose the default version.
list of servers and their latencies to client, DSM will created the server on one of this list. Fill it blank if you use Local DS.
custom attributes defined in game mode's matching/flexing rule.

briefdescription.para: On success, we poll Latencies (if Settings allows us to).
start the matchmaking

parameterdescription.para: The mode that party member want to play.
Optional parameters to be considered while matchmaking.

briefdescription.para: cancel the currently running matchmaking process

parameterdescription.para: The mode that party member want to cancel.
Is canceling matchmaking that was started using temporary party.

briefdescription.para: send ready consent request

parameterdescription.para: The id of a match user ready to play.

briefdescription.para: send reject consent request

parameterdescription.para: The id of a match user ready to play.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &SessionID, FString const &GameMode, FString const &ClientVersion, FString const &Region, FString const &Deployment, FString const &ServerName=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: RequestDS

briefdescription.para: Request Dedicated custom server.

parameterdescription.para: Session ID of the game session.
The mode that party member want to play.
The version of DS, fill it blank to choose the default version.
The region where the party member want to play.
The deployment mode where the party member requested
The Local DS name, fill it blank if you don't use Local DS.

briefdescription.para: Unbind all matchmaking notif delegates set previously.
Unbind all matchmaking response delegates set previously.
set start matchmaking response

parameterdescription.para: set delegate .
Delegate that will be called when operation failed.

briefdescription.para: set cancel matchmaking notification

parameterdescription.para: set delegate .
Delegate that will be called when operation failed.

briefdescription.para: set ready consent response notification

parameterdescription.para: set delegate .
Delegate that will be called when operation failed.

parameterdescription.para: set delegate .
Delegate that will be called when operation failed.

parameterdescription.para: set delegate .

briefdescription.para: set ready consent notification

parameterdescription.para: set delegate.

briefdescription.para: set create DS response delegate

parameterdescription.para: Delegate to set.
Delegate that will be called when operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Serialize the Qos Latencies obj into a stringified json object.

listitem.para:
Multiple regions are possible (hence the TArray).
SelectedLatencies
Array of latencies pair, key is region name and value is latency in ms.

briefdescription.para: Lobby API for chatting and party management. Unlike other servers which use HTTP, Lobby server uses WebSocket (RFC 6455).
